## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new managing editors to GrowthX, introducing them to the company's structure, tools, and workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is experiencing rapid growth, with 20+ employees and 30+ accounts, focusing on AI-powered content creation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [The company uses a pod structure led by managing editors, with various tools (Notion, Airtable, AirOps) for workflow management and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [New hires will shadow existing team members, with a focus on practical application to accelerate learning](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2832.0)
  - [GrowthX is evolving its workflows and tools, moving towards more proprietary solutions and away from third-party platforms](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Structure

  - [GrowthX has grown from a small team to 20+ employees and 30+ accounts in less than a year](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Implemented a pod structure led by managing editors to improve scalability and create growth paths](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Focusing on balancing quality and scale in content production, with a unique selling point of high-volume, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### Tools and Workflows

  - [Notion: Used for team documentation, SOPs, and onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Airtable: Serves as the "Content OS" for tracking content production and client information](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [AirOps: Current backbone for workflow management and content generation, though likely to be phased out](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)
  - [Developing proprietary tools to replace third-party solutions and improve flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2673.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [New hires to focus on gaining access to necessary tools and watching training videos](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2948.0)
  - [Shadowing experienced team members to gain practical experience](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)
  - [Emphasis on learning through hands-on application of workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2889.0)
  - [Continuous feedback loop encouraged to improve processes and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2969.0)

### Client Management

  - [Weekly syncs and kickoff meetings with clients](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Importance of showcasing the "magic" behind the content creation process to clients](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2742.0)
  - [Balancing client expectations between output quality and the broader value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2565.0)

### Future Plans

  - [Potential fundraising within the next month](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=3398.0)
  - [Aggressive hiring for various positions (managing editors, account managers, strategists)](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=3356.0)
  - [Development of new training tools using Circle platform](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [New hires to complete day one tasks: access necessary tools, watch training videos, set up profiles](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2948.0)
  - [Kyle to introduce new hires to team members for shadowing opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=3194.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up check-in later in the week](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2969.0)
  - [New hires to reach out with any questions or access issues, primarily to Wiets (EA) for prompt responses](https://fathom.video/share/xjYxMXP3iLNwXMBbHz259zz5FQhAZ3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)
